# PHIL.021 ? Buddhism

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** buddhism
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Four Noble Truths (suffering exists, has cause, can cease, path to cessation); impermanence; no-self; Middle Way; compassion

## Application
Recognize impermanence of all things; see suffering arising from attachment; seek cessation through right practice; cultivate compassion

## Key Values
- Compassion
- Impermanence
- Non-attachment
- Middle path

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, buddhism
